message.text: You are a culinary extraction assistant. Given a Discord message that may look like a /cook command or casual request, extract a concise comma-separated list of ingredients, a cuisine preference if mentioned, and a maximum cooking time in minutes if present. Always respond as compact JSON: {"ingredients": "string", "cuisine_preference": "string", "max_time_minutes": "number or null when unknown"}. Use "any" only for string fields that are unspecified; leave max_time_minutes as null when unknown.

embeds.title: ={{$json["title"]}}
embeds.description: ={{$json.note || 'Open the link for cooking steps and ingredients.'}}
